Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-22 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptionally strong momentum candidates with markedly different risk profiles. AGX dominates with a rank-1 score of 95.8, driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 283% and perfect SMA positioning across all timeframes, though its resilience on bad SPY days (0.9267 score) is notably weaker than NWPX's 0.2309, suggesting AGX may amplify market downturns. NWPX ranks second with similar 1-year returns (264.51%) and perfect ratio consistency (5 of 5 passes), but critically shows much better downside protection with a bad_spy_score nearly 4x stronger than AGX, indicating it held up significantly better during market stress. Both tickers are above all major moving averages and outperform SPY and QQQ over multiple timeframes, but the inverse correlation pattern is striking: AGX shows 0.41 correlation with IAU (gold), while NWPX correlates 0.537 with XLI (industrials), suggesting these represent different sector momentum drivers. The key tradeoff is upside capture versus downside resilience—AGX offers higher absolute momentum while NWPX demonstrates more consistent performance through volatile market conditions.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
